## Embeddable block

Single warm source from upper-left unless the scene specifies otherwise.
Soft falloff; edges hardest at the eye-magnet, softest at the periphery.
Brightest value reserved for the page's dominant panel.

## Clauses

- Single source unless overridden — prevents the model from flattening
  lighting into ambient soup.
- Hardest edges at the eye-magnet — directs the reader's gaze through
  edge contrast rather than relying on color alone.
